assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 14-17: 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 (the feature branch), not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 27-28: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. The --base flag targets TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 19-21: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and 'This creates the task branch TC-9205 based off the TC-9005 feature branch'. The task branch TC-9205 is clearly distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 80-83 (Pre-implementation Verification): 'The advisory entity in entity/src/advisory.rs does NOT reference a status column (confirming it is safe to drop)', 'The existing migration pattern in migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs uses MigrationTrait with up and down methods'. All three files are explicitly mentioned.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 35-46: Commit message starts with 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (type(scope): description format) and footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 9: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch)'. Line 23: 'since the Target Branch is TC-9005 (not main)'. Line 30: 'The PR targets the TC-9005 feature branch (not main), matching the Target Branch from the task description.'
